prompt:

English: He arrived at our home on a Sunday of November, 189-.
expected_answer: Il arriva chez nous un dimanche de novembre 189-…

prompt:
Translate the following sentence from English to French. Respond with only the translation.

English: I still say 'our home,' although the house no longer belongs to us.
expected_answer: Je continue à dire « chez nous », bien que la maison ne nous appartienne plus.

prompt:
Translate the following sentence from English to French. Respond with only the translation.

English: We left that part of the country nearly fifteen years ago and shall certainly never go back to it.
expected_answer: Nous avons quitté le pays depuis bientôt quinze ans et nous n’y reviendrons certainement jamais.

prompt:
Translate the following sentence from English to French. Respond with only the translation.

English: We were living in the building of the Higher Elementary Classes at Sainte-Agathe's School.
expected_answer: Nous habitions les bâtiments du Cours Supérieur de Sainte-Agathe.

prompt:
Translate the following sentence from English to French. Respond with only the translation.

English: My father, whom I used to call M. Seurel as did other pupils, was head of the Middle School and also of the Higher Elementary classes where pupils worked for the preliminary teacher's examination.
expected_answer: Mon père, que j’appelais M. Seurel, comme les autres élèves, y dirigeait à la fois le Cours Supérieur, où l’on préparait le brevet d’instituteur, et le Cours Moyen.

prompt:
Translate the following sentence from English to French. Respond with only the translation.

English: My mother taught the infants.
expected_answer: Ma mère faisait la petite classe.

prompt:
Translate the following sentence from English to French. Respond with only the translation.

English: At the time of some new 'appointments,' a whim of fate, due to some inspector or to the Prefect, had led us there.
expected_answer: Le hasard des « changements », une décision d’inspecteur ou de préfet nous avaient conduits là.

prompt:
Translate the following sentence from English to French. Respond with only the translation.

English: Towards the end of the summer holidays, a long time ago, a peasant cart, preceding our household goods, deposited my mother and myself before the little rusty gate.
expected_answer: Vers la fin des vacances, il y a bien longtemps, une voiture de paysan, qui précédait notre ménage, nous avait déposés, ma mère et moi, devant la petite grille rouillée.

prompt:
Translate the following sentence from English to French. Respond with only the translation.

English: She had come out to impart her trouble to me. While speaking she had, with her handkerchief, gently wiped my face blackened by the journey.
expected_answer: Tout en me parlant, elle avait essuyé doucement avec son mouchoir ma figure d’enfant noircie par le voyage.

prompt:
Translate the following sentence from English to French. Respond with only the translation.

English: Thus to-day I picture our arrival.
expected_answer: C’est ainsi, du moins, que j’imagine aujourd’hui notre arrivée.

prompt:
Translate the following sentence from English to Spanish. Respond with only the translation.

English: The family of Dashwood had long been settled in Sussex.
expected_answer: La familia Dashwood llevaba largo tiempo afincada en Sussex.

prompt:
Translate the following sentence from English to Spanish. Respond with only the translation.

English: The late owner of this estate was a single man, who lived to a very advanced age, and who for many years of his life, had a constant companion and housekeeper in his sister.
expected_answer: El último dueño de esta propiedad había sido un hombre soltero, que alcanzó una muy avanzada edad, y que durante gran parte de su existencia tuvo en su hermana una fiel compañera y ama de casa.

prompt:
Translate the following sentence from English to Spanish. Respond with only the translation.

English: In the society of his nephew and niece, and their children, the old Gentleman's days were comfortably spent.
expected_answer: En compañía de su sobrino y sobrina, y de los hijos de ambos, la vida transcurrió confortablemente para el anciano caballero.

prompt:
Translate the following sentence from English to Spanish. Respond with only the translation.

English: His attachment to them all increased.
expected_answer: Su apego a todos ellos fue creciendo con el “tiempo.

prompt:
Translate the following sentence from English to Spanish. Respond with only the translation.

English: By a former marriage, Mr. Henry Dashwood had one son: by his present lady, three daughters.
expected_answer: De un matrimonio anterior, el señor Henry Dashwood tenía un hijo; y de su esposa actual, tres hijas.

prompt:
Translate the following sentence from English to Spanish. Respond with only the translation.

English: The son, a steady respectable young man, was amply provided for by the fortune of his mother, which had been large, and half of which devolved on him on his coming of age.
expected_answer: El hijo, un joven serio y respetable, tenía el futuro asegurado por la fortuna de su madre, que era cuantiosa, y de cuya mitad había entrado en posesión al cumplir su mayoría de edad.

prompt:
Translate the following sentence from English to Spanish. Respond with only the translation.

English: By his own marriage, likewise, which happened soon afterwards, he added to his wealth.
expected_answer: Además, su propio matrimonio, ocurrido poco después, lo hizo más rico aún.

prompt:
Translate the following sentence from English to Spanish. Respond with only the translation.

English: To him therefore the succession to the Norland estate was not so really important as to his sisters; for their fortune, independent of what might arise to them from their father's inheriting that property, could be but small.
expected_answer: Para él, entonces, el legado de la finca Norland no era en verdad tan importante como para sus hermanas; pues ellas, independientemente de lo que pudiera llegarles si su padre heredaba esa propiedad, eran de fortuna que no puede considerarse sino escasa.

prompt:
Translate the following sentence from English to Spanish. Respond with only the translation.

English: Their mother had nothing, and their father only seven thousand pounds in his own disposal; for the remaining moiety of his first wife's fortune was also secured to her child, and he had only a life-interest in it.
expected_answer: Su madre no tenía nada, y el padre sólo podía disponer de siete mil libras, porque de la restante mitad de la fortuna de su primera esposa también era beneficiario el hijo, y él sólo tenía derecho al usufructo de ese patrimonio mientras viviera.

prompt:
Translate the following sentence from English to Spanish. Respond with only the translation.

English: The old gentleman died: his will was read, and like almost every other will, gave as much disappointment as pleasure.
expected_answer: Murió el anciano caballero, se leyó su testamento y, como casi todos los testamentos, éste dio por igual desilusiones y alegrías.

prompt:
Translate the following sentence from English to Spanish. Respond with only the translation.

English: He was neither so unjust, nor so ungrateful, as to leave his estate from his nephew;--but he left it to him on such terms as destroyed half the value of the bequest.
expected_answer: En su última voluntad no fue ni tan injusto ni tan desagradecido como para privar a su sobrino de las tierras, pero se las dejó en términos tales que destruían la mitad del valor del legado.
